news.summary:
<p>ISLAMABAD: The PTI confirmed on Sunday that Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Chief Minister Sohail Afridi and party chairperson Barrister Gohar Ali Khan had held a meeting with Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi in previous days.</p>

news.headline: Suspected Ebola cases in eastern DR Congo pass 900 as health workers struggle with aid cuts
news.summary: As the number of suspected Ebola cases in the eastern Democratic Republic of Congo pass 900, health workers say that the chaos left by years of fighting and local government failures has been compounded by sweeping cuts to international aid budgets.

news.headline: Israeli strikes kill six in southern Lebanon amid fresh evacuation orders
news.summary: Israel's attacks in southern Lebanon are expanding despite supposed ceasefire.

news.headline: Israeli Leader Says He and Trump Agree On Blocking an Iranian Nuclear Weapon
